File.title: File
File.description: A legal document or evidence file indexed from Google Drive.

webViewLink.description: Link to view the file in Google Drive

processed.description: Whether the file has been processed by AI

summary.description: AI-generated summary of the file content

ownerId.description: UID of the user who owns this file

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the file was indexed

Entity.title: Entity
Entity.description: A person, organization, or location extracted from a file.

fileId.description: ID of the file where this entity was found

ownerId.description: UID of the user who owns this entity

Event.title: Event
Event.description: A chronological event extracted from a file.

fileId.description: ID of the file where this event was found

ownerId.description: UID of the user who owns this event
